---
title: "Take Away Gallery"
author: "David Rach"
format: html
toc: true
toc-depth: 5
---

![](/images/WebsiteBanner.png)

::: {style="text-align: right;"}
[![AGPL-3.0](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-AGPLv3-blue)](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/agpl-3.0.en.html) [![CC BY-SA 4.0](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-CC%20BY--SA%204.0-lightgrey.svg)](http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/)
:::

# Week 01

![Marsh, Klikor-Agbozume, Volta Region, Ghana](/course/01_InstallingRPackages/images/ExitImage.png)

# Week 02

![Coconut Grove, Klikor-Agbozume, Volta Region, Ghana](/course/02_FilePaths/images/Week2Exit.jpg)

# Week 03

![Sunset, Dakar, Senegal](/course/03_InsideFCSFile/images/TakeAway.jpg)

# Week 04

![Sunset1, Klikor-Agbozume, Volta Region, Ghana](/course/04_IntroToTidyverse/images/TakeAway.jpg)

# Week 05

![Sunset2, Klikor-Agbozume, Volta Region, Ghana](/course/05_GatingSets/images/SunsetSatzi.jpg)

# Week 06

![Cherry Blossoms, Baltimore, Maryland, USA](/course/06_Visualizing/images/TakeAway.jpg)

# Week 07

![Fall Foliage, Baltimore, Maryland, USA](/course/07_Transformations/images/TakeAway.png)

# Week 08

![Palenque, Chiapas, Mexico](/course/08_WaysToGate/images/TakeAway.jpg)
